metadata.title: Raíces & Returnings - Ashley & Oly
metadata.description: A space for the stories we carry, the ones we're still learning how to tell, and the ones we're finally ready to live. Reflections on identity, queerness, healing, spirituality, and home. Recipes passed down and reimagined.
metadata.keywords: Ashley & Oly, Raíces & Returnings, queerness, identity, healing, spirituality, recipes, migration, Venezuelan food, LGBTQ+, blog, reflections, culture, home, storytelling

footer.brand-desc: A digital space for the stories we carry and the ones we are still learning how to tell. Celebrating identity, queerness, healing, and the recipes that bring us home.

Home.title: Welcome to
Home.subtitle: Raíces & Returnings
Home.paragraph-description: A space for the stories we carry, the ones we're still learning how to tell, and the ones we're finally ready to live.
Home.paragraph-description-two: Here, you'll find reflections on identity, queerness, healing, spirituality, and home. You'll find recipes passed down and reimagined. You'll find reminders—written and wearable—that speak to the parts of you still becoming.
Home.paragraph-fresh: New reflections. New recipes. Same corazón. Catch the latest stories, kitchen moments, and real talk—straight from us to you. Scroll through, click around, stay a while.

About.introduction-paragraph: Two voices, one home. Rooted in different lands, shaped by survival, stitched together by healing. We created Raíces & Returnings to hold everything that never fit neatly into categories— love that defies scripts, food that carries memory, queerness that feels holy, and stories that don't end where they began. It's part blog, part kitchen table, part altar. A little messy. Deeply honest. And always real.
About.description-paragraph-oly: I was born in Venezuela and raised by real life—not by a plan. I've lived through silence, migration, heartbreak, survival. I've lost parts of myself and found new ones in places I never expected. I'm not here to impress anyone—I'm here because I know what it means to start over. More than once. You'll find me mostly in the kitchen section of this site—where food becomes language and memory. But I'm also part of everything else: the healing, the humor, the truth. I'm here because I believe what I share.
About.description-paragraph-ashley: I'm a conscious creator—of words, of space, of meaning. I was shaped in the in-between. Between languages. Between cultures. I've lived through things that made me question everything—then offered me a voice to speak through it. Now, I live with intention. I write to remember. I create to reclaim. I've lived through chaos, through closeting, through calling. Now, I live in a way that honors all of it. My voice here is rooted in reflection—on identity, spirituality, queerness, healing, and the sacredness of returning.

Contact.title: Want to reach us?
Contact.paragraph: We'd love to hear from you—whether it's a thought, a question, a collaboration, or just something you wanted to say. Fill out the form below, and we'll do our best to get back to you soon.
Contact.toast-error: There was an error sending your message. Please try again.
Contact.subject: Subject
Contact.placeholder-subject: Enter the subject of your message

validation.email-invalid: Please enter a valid email address

Email.subject: Thanks for reaching out to Raíces & Returnings 🌿
Email.title: Thank you for being here.
Email.brandMessage: We're Ashley & Oly, the voices and hearts behind Raíces & Returnings. This space was born from our stories—stories of migration, memory, queerness, healing, and home. It's a space where recipes carry history, reflections hold truth, and even the merch is made with meaning. Here's what you'll find in our little corner of the internet:
Email.list-one: 🥄 Recipes rooted in culture and love
Email.list-two: 📝 Blogs that reflect on identity, spirituality, and growth
Email.list-three: 🛍 Merch designed with intention (and a lot of corazón)
Email.response-message: We're so glad you reached out. Whether you had a question, an idea, or just wanted to say hi—your presence here matters to us. We're building a community, not a following. Thanks for being part of it. We'll get back to you as soon as we can.
Email.footer-text: This email was sent because you contacted us through our website.

EmailDownload.preview: Download available for 48 hours + lifetime access to your private community.
EmailDownload.heading: {productName} is ready

EmailDownload.linkInstruction: Prefer to copy the link? Paste this URL into your browser:
EmailDownload.downloadWarning: Please download your PDF within the next 48 hours—this link will only be active for a limited time.
EmailDownload.communityInvite: Before you dive in, join the virtual community for {productName} — a safe space to share reflections, ask questions, and walk alongside others.
EmailDownload.ctaBoxIntro: Join from Safari or your computer, or download the GoKollab app to keep everything in one place.
EmailDownload.ctaBoxNote: * Note: If the link does not open, clear your browser cache or copy and paste it into a new tab.
EmailDownload.ctaBoxGoogle: When you register, choose "Continue with Google" for the best experience.
EmailDownload.supportLine: You are not walking alone. If you need support, reply to this email or reach us at <emailLink>{email}</emailLink>.

NotPostFound.subtleQuote: "Every great story begins with a blank page"

Ebook.metadata-description: Explore our curated collection of digital ebooks that delve into identity, spirituality, sexual diversity, and healing.
Ebook.title: For the Seekers, the Questioners, the Reclaimers.
Ebook.subtitle: Find your spiritual homecoming in guided journeys designed for authentic transformation.
